artifacts.content:
# Technical Spec

## Overview
This document outlines the proposed resolution for the export latency issue.

import json
import time

def track_export_latency():
    start = time.time()
    # Simulate export
    time.sleep(1.5)
    return time.time() - start

print(track_export_latency())

activityLog.detail: User supplied customer feedback and asked what to build next. Supr selected BuildSignal workflow.
Supr spun up a temporary agent for feedback clustering. Permission: Observe + Draft. Expires on mission completion.
Found 3 distinct pain groups from 50 support tickets.
Analyzed competitor telemetry. Extracted signals from 3 major competitors.
Research Agent authorized to read abandoned_github_issues.csv.
Reason: Missing test cases. Supr issued revised guidance and incremented retry count.

activityLog.summary: Sent revised guidance to Spec Agent.
activityLog.detail: Failure type: Quality Failure. Supr updated task guidance: include at least 3 test cases covering edge cases.

failures.suprGuidance: Include at least 3 test cases covering edge cases and data validation.

agents.name: Supr
agents.description: Central router for all mission activity. Subagents communicate only through this agent.

agents.name: Research Agent
agents.description: Gathers, reads, compares, and summarizes information from files or web.

agents.name: Code Agent
agents.description: Works inside the code workspace to edit files, run tests, and report failures.

agents.name: QA / Critic
agents.description: Reviews outputs against standards. Checks evidence, completeness, and tests.

agents.name: Sub-Supr (Frontend)
agents.description: Manages a specialized sub-team to execute frontend-specific tasks.
